payload.title: Actuator Improvement Weekly Report
payload.summary: This report summarizes the current actuator abstraction progress and the next delivery tranche.

sections.heading: Current State
body: Document-brief now routes invoice, proposal, and diagram deliverables through a canonical semantic contract.

callouts.title: Readiness
callouts.body: Canonical routes now cover invoice, proposal, diagram, spreadsheet, and report deliverables.

sections.heading: Next Focus
body: Spreadsheet and report output are being aligned to the same abstraction.

callouts.title: Remaining Work
callouts.body: Move more tracker/report spacing, table styling, and validations into knowledge-owned layout catalogs.
